# OpenAI Status Page - Incident History Extract

**Page Details:**
- Source: OpenAI Status Page (status.openai.com)
- Last Updated: Thursday, March 26, 2026
- Content Type: RSS Feed of Resolved Incidents

## All Incidents Listed (Most Recent First)

### March 2026
- **Mar 25**: "Unable to download or preview project files" - File download/preview service affected
- **Mar 24**: "Elevated error rates on Realtime API SIP endpoints" - Realtime API SIP service degraded
- **Mar 24**: "Increased errors creating new sync apps and sync delays" - Sync apps creation affected
- **Mar 24**: "Some customer may encounter errors creating, updating projects, and uploading files" - File uploads experiencing degraded performance
- **Mar 21**: "Pinned chats are not loading on web browsers for ChatGPT" - Conversations component affected, resolved
- **Mar 18**: "Sora video generation failing" - Video generation service, resolved
- **Mar 17**: "Excel Plugin is inaccessible for some users" - Connectors/Apps affected, resolved
- **Mar 17**: "High Error rates with ChatGPT 5.4 Pro" - Conversations, resolved
- **Mar 17**: "Elevated errors for sign-in and account creation" - Login component, resolved
- **Mar 17**: "Elevated Errors Affecting ChatGPT Free and Guest Plan Users" - Conversations, resolved
- **Mar 13**: "Responses API errors when using background mode" - Responses API affected
- **Mar 13**: "Conversation Errors for Logged out Users" - Conversations affected
- **Mar 12**: "Some users seeing 'No Accessible Workspaces' when attempting" - Workspace access affected
- **Mar 12**: "Increased errors with ChatGPT file downloads" - File downloads affected
- **Mar 12**: "Increased errors on ChatGPT File Uploads" - File uploads affected

- **Mar 11**: "Elevated conversation errors for ChatGPT" - Conversations affected
- **Mar 11**: "Elevated error rates for Deep Research in Enterprise" - Deep Research affected
- **Mar 11**: "Codex unresponsive" - Codex affected

- **Mar 06**: "Errors with Compliance API" - Compliance API affected

- **Mar 02**: "Errors in Sora API" - Sora API affected

### Additional Notable Incidents (Chronologically Descending)
Services affected across incidents include: Conversations, Login, File uploads, Image Generation, Codex, Deep Research, Voice mode, GPTs, Agent, Compliance API, Connectors/Apps, Search, Responses, Batch, Audio, Realtime, Fine-tuning, Embeddings, Video generation, and ChatGPT Atlas.

**Common Issue Categories:**
- Authentication/Login errors
- Conversation/Chat functionality failures
- File upload and processing issues
- API error rate elevations
- Video and image generation problems
- Regional service degradation (EU, LATAM)
- Integration/connector availability

All listed incidents show status as "Resolved" with full service recovery noted.
